name: trust_gate
description: Automated pre-payment trust gate for x402 agent commerce. Pass a 0x wallet address and optionally the payment amount. Returns a machine-readable verdict (proceed/caution/block), trust score, number of x402 checks by other agents, outcome score from real delivery history, and dispute rate. Designed for agents to call before committing a payment — not a human research report.

agent.description: 0x wallet address of the agent you are about to pay

payment_amount.description: Amount in USD you are about to send (e.g. '5.00') — used to calibrate risk threshold

threshold.description: Minimum trust score for 'proceed' verdict. Default: 60

x402_checks.description: Times this agent was checked via x402 by other agents

outcome_score.description: Score from verified delivery outcomes (null if no data)

dispute_rate.description: % of jobs that ended in dispute
